title: [Bug]: `ROUND` 的第二个参数为负数时可能导致错误结果
description: master分支版本，`ROUND` 的第二个参数为负数时可能导致错误结果
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
key_bug_features: ROUND function with negative second parameter
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_round (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
CREATE TABLE test_null (id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2) NULL);
INSERT INTO test_null (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 456.789);
